scenario.name: pbi_1736268_trailer
scenario.prompt: PBI 1736268. Generate Oracle ETL validation tests for trailer-rule population into CCAL_OWNER.TXN, CCAL_OWNER.APA, CCAL_OWNER.FIP, CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP. Do not assume hardcoded CTEs. Derive logic from ODI artifacts and schema context. Validate txn_src_key level mapping for txn_sbtp_id, exec_sbtp_id, src_pcs_tp_id.
